properties.Test Case: Content Pages tab: Default Theme: make a basic Moon & Cap. Try Page Numbers on or off. Try A5 (portrait and landscape): ensure page numbers alternate left and right sides. Try Device (P & L): ensure page numbers are centered. Examine several other page layouts and ensure margins and padding at not messed up. A4, A6, Letter, Half-Letter, Device.
properties.Steps: Content Pages tab: Default Theme: make a basic Moon & Cap. Try Page Numbers on or off. Try A5 (portrait and landscape): ensure page numbers alternate left and right sides. Try Device (P & L): ensure page numbers are centered. Examine several other page layouts and ensure margins and padding at not messed up. A4, A6, Letter, Half-Letter, Device.

properties.Test Case: Auto migration: Some notes on Branding and Appearance system migration can be found here. Test a couple of auto-migrations for EFL books. Test a couple of active brandings like Little Zebra and ensure they don't break.
properties.Steps: Auto migration: Some notes on Branding and Appearance system migration can be found here. Test a couple of auto-migrations for EFL books. Test a couple of active brandings like Little Zebra and ensure they don't break.

properties.Test Case: Default Margins & Padding: Make new books from the main book templates (Basic, Sign Language, Big, Comic) and their pages. Compare with screenshots.
properties.Steps: Default Margins & Padding: Make new books from the main book templates (Basic, Sign Language, Big, Comic) and their pages. Compare with screenshots.

properties.Test Case: Themes, Margins & Padding: Make a fresh derivative of "A Family Learns about Immunisations" in an English collection. Try various page sizes (at least A5 & Device) and portrait and landscape layouts with and without page numbers turned on. Try ebook themes for Device layout. Verify against the screenshot results here. (Note: screenshots have images fit-to-size and layout adjusted to landscape or portrait as needed.)
properties.Steps: Themes, Margins & Padding: Make a fresh derivative of "A Family Learns about Immunisations" in an English collection. Try various page sizes (at least A5 & Device) and portrait and landscape layouts with and without page numbers turned on. Try ebook themes for Device layout. Verify against the screenshot results here. (Note: screenshots have images fit-to-size and layout adjusted to landscape or portrait as needed.)

properties.Test Case: Preparation: - clean machine install of Bloom (clear out C:\Users\USERS\AppData\Local\BloomBetaInternal and C:\Users\USERS\AppData\Local\SIL\BetaInternalxxx) - from \Bloom Team\Testing\Materials for Bloom Editor Testing\Decodable Reader Rapid Test Resources, install the three Reader Template Bloom Packs - create brand new collections of French, Turka (TUZ), and English
properties.Steps:
Preparation: 
- clean machine install of Bloom (clear out C:\Users\USERS\AppData\Local\BloomBetaInternal and C:\Users\USERS\AppData\Local\SIL\BetaInternalxxx)
- from \Bloom Team\Testing\Materials for Bloom Editor Testing\Decodable Reader Rapid Test Resources, install the three Reader Template Bloom Packs
- create brand new collections of French, Turka (TUZ), and English
